description: Project-setup plugin hooks — deterministic steps to run at each stage of project setup.

hooks.name: pre-setup
hooks.description: Ensure .gitignore has AI tool entries before symlinks are created

hooks.name: setup-core
hooks.description: Create AI tool symlinks and _scrape/ bucket structure

hooks.name: post-setup
hooks.description: Generate sudo block for agentuser permissions (output only, no side effects)
